description: Introducing our 90g Fruity Smelly Ball with Keyring, the ultimate sensory accessory for endless fun wherever you go! Bursting with delightful fruity scents, this colourful ball is not just for play—it's an experience. Attach it to your keys, backpack, or purse, and enjoy the invigorating aroma as you bounce and squeeze away stress and tension. Perfect for all ages, whether you're relieving stress during the day or simply adding a pop of fruity fun to your ensemble. Get ready to awaken your senses with our Fruity Smelly Ball with Keyring—it's not just a ball, it's an adventure!
